meta.title: Jex — Secrets Manager for Developer Teams
meta.description: Share secrets, not .env files. Jex is an open-source secrets manager with AES-256-GCM encryption, RBAC, and a Go CLI.

hero.headline: Share secrets,
hero.subheadline: Jex is an open-source secrets manager for developer teams. Encrypted vault, Go CLI, and a dashboard — without ever leaking a plaintext value.
hero.socialProof: Free and self-hostable · AES-256-GCM encryption · RBAC · Audit trail

problem.headline: Your secrets are scattered.
problem.subheadline: Every team develops workarounds. None of them are secure. Jex fixes the root cause.
problem.card1Body: Sharing secrets over chat is a security incident waiting to happen. Jex gives every team member the exact secret they need — no message history to audit.
problem.card2Body: One vault, one source of truth. When a secret rotates, every developer and every environment gets the update automatically — no manual sync.
problem.card3Body: jex run injects secrets at process launch — in memory, never to disk. No .env file, no accidental git add, no exposure in your repository history.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps. Start in five minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add secrets to the vault via the dashboard or CLI. Every value is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before it touches the database. The server never holds plaintext.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use jex secrets pull to write an atomic .env file, or jex run to inject directly into your process environment — no file ever written.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your process starts with secrets in its environment. Teammates, CI/CD pipelines, and different environments each get exactly the secrets they're authorized to see.

features.headline: Everything a team needs.
features.subheadline: Built for developer teams who take security seriously without sacrificing developer experience.
features.feat1Desc: Every secret is encrypted before it reaches the database. The server never holds plaintext values — your keys, your control.
features.feat2Desc: Owners, members, and read-only roles. Scope CI/CD tokens to a single environment. The last owner can never be removed.
features.feat3Desc: dev, staging, prod — each environment is isolated. A member scoped to dev cannot read prod secrets, by design.
features.feat4Desc: Every read, write, and delete is recorded atomically alongside the secret operation. Immutable. Filterable. Always consistent.
features.feat5Desc: Create scoped tokens for pipelines with read-only access to a single environment. Revoke them instantly — no cache, no delay.
features.feat6Desc: Run the full stack with docker-compose up. Open-source, MIT licensed. No vendor lock-in, no data leaving your infrastructure.

install.headline: Start in 5 minutes.
install.subheadline: Install the CLI, log in, initialize your project, and pull secrets — all from your terminal.
